creator: peter@czanik.hu
text:
Thanks for the report, I just verified both problems, which your patch resolves.

There are already many bugfixes in git head since 3.8.1 is released. Once 3.8.2 is released, we can recopy the syslog-ng-devel port to syslog-ng38 and point the syslog-ng port to this one.
